name: publication
description: Guidance for published-project documentation, installation, deployment, verification, troubleshooting, and operator-facing instructions.

# Publication Skill

Use this skill when working on a published or externally consumed project.

## Ownership

This skill owns:
- publication-facing installation guidance
- deployment and verification instructions for users/operators
- published-project document boundaries
- troubleshooting and uninstall guidance for published setups

## Root Document Boundaries

- `README.md` is the public entry point and should stay concise.
- `INSTRUCTIONS.md` should exist only for published/external-facing projects.
- Detailed publication and deployment knowledge should live in this skill's `docs/` files.

## Detailed Guides

See:

- `docs/deployment-guide.md`
- `docs/published-project-docs.md`
